readings.citation:
Ps 98:1, 2-3, 3-4, R. see v.2b
The Lord has revealed to the nations his saving power.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 98:1, 2-3, 3-4, R. see v.2b
The Lord has revealed to the nations his saving power.

readings.summary: If we die with Jesus we will live with him.

In all circumstances, give thanks,
for this is the will of God for you in Christ Jesus.
Jesus cures ten lepers, one returns with thanks.

antiphons.text:
If you, O Lord, should mark iniquities,
Lord, who could stand?
But with you is found forgiveness,
O God of Israel.

The rich suffer want and go hungry,
but those who seek the Lord lack no blessing.

When the Lord appears, we shall be like him,
for we shall see him as he is.
